recentArticles.title: Why Michael Jackson’s daughter, Paris, won’t stop ‘til she gets enough from his estate - The Conversation
recentArticles.snippet: She is asking a court to take a closer look at how the pop icon’s estate is being handled by its executors – the people responsible for managing it. Paris Jackson has accused executors John Branca and John McClain of paying themselves and the estate’s lawyers too much, and for leaving $464 million owned by the estate uninvested. Paris Jackson has also stated that the $150 million film is a “botched production.” The executors have responded by arguing that the application of their expertise to other productions about the singer has already provided a huge payoff to the estate. The executors also recently won a court battle against Paris Jackson that ended with a judge ordering her to pay their attorney’s fees in a related dispute. Like other executors in this situation, the men handling Jackson’s estate have hired lawyers, accountants and other professionals to assist them. In this case, Paris Jackson is complaining that the compensation paid to executors of her father’s estate has been excessive.

MGK first announced the exciting news that he welcomed his second daughter, his first with Fox, on his Instagram. recentArticles.title: Howie Mandel doubles down on awkward apology to Kelly Ripa, Mark Consuelos: 'I look great' - ew.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Howie Mandel doubles down on awkward semi-apology after snapping at Mark Consuelos, Kelly Ripa on air. Mandel said it's "up to you to discern" whether or not his apology video was genuine, after he snapped at Ripa and Consuelos on "Live With Kelly and Mark.". Howie Mandel has doubled down on his awkward semi-apology to Kelly Ripa and Mark Consuelos, after the *America's Got Talent* host and comedian snapped at the cohosting couple live on the air. Days after sharing an Instagram video in which he partially apologized for scolding on television the *Live With Kelly and Mark* stars for praising his looks at age 70, Mandel added another layer of confusion to the ordeal in his answer to a podcaster's inquiry on the matter. In the comments section of Mandel's original apology video, longtime *Live* producer Michael Gelman shared his thoughts as he wrote, "During these divided times, one thing we can all agree upon is that you do look great ...For your age.".

recentArticles.title: NFL star Nacua in rehab, says attorney - Yahoo Sports
recentArticles.snippet: # NFL star Nacua in rehab, says attorney. Los Angeles Rams wide receiver Puka Nacua has checked himself into rehab, his attorney said Wednesday. The Rams star "voluntarily entered a private facility to focus on his health, personal growth, and overall development," lawyer Levi McCathern told AFP in a statement. Nacua topped the NFL with 129 receptions last season, adding a total of 1,715 yards, as the Rams reached the NFC Championship game before losing to eventual Super Bowl winners Seattle. Last month, a Jewish woman filed a lawsuit against Nacua alleging that he made an antisemitic statement and later bit her during a night out in Los Angeles on New Year's Eve. His lawyer said Nacua denies the allegation of antisemitism, calling it a "blatant lie," and describing the bite as "horseplay.". Nacua's decision to enter rehab was prior to and unrelated to the lawsuit, said the attorney.

recentArticles.title: Seeing Steph Curry is a reminder Warriors have plenty left to play for - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # Seeing Steph Curry is a reminder Warriors have plenty left to play for. ## In a season marred by injuries, the Golden State Warriors still have stakes to play for with Stephen Curry on the mend and some ambitions for this season and next to realize and sustain. Curry hadn’t shot on the floor before a game — with the whole world watching — since the last game he played, January 30th, sixty days earlier. If Curry returns Sunday, the Warriors would have five regular-season games remaining to try to get organized for a play-in game on either April 14 or April 15. There was some hope — certainly from ESPN — that Curry could play in the nationally televised game on Wednesday night. Seeing Steph Curry is a reminder Warriors have plenty left to play for. In a season marred by injuries, the Golden State Warriors still have stakes to play for with Stephen Curry on the mend and some ambitions for this season and next to realize and sustain.

recentArticles.title: Zayn Reveals Daughter Inspired Collab With Jisoo: ‘I Got Some Good Dad Points for That’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: In a new interview with SiriusXM, the former boy band member shares that his daughter is a big K-pop fan and that he asks her opinion on his new music. In a Tuesday (March 31) interview with SiriusXM’s The Pulse, the former One Direction member spoke about upcoming album, *Konnakol*, and sharing his music with his five-year-old daughter, Khai, to get her opinion on his work. “She loves my music and she definitely gives me an opinion,” Zayn replied. “She gave me a double thumbs up for a few songs and there was like a side one for one or two, I think, that she wasn’t really into,” said Zayn. How Khai really directed Zayn’s musical path, though, is with her love of K-pop. Last year, Zayn and Jisoo partnered up for the Billboard Hot 100 hit single “Eyes Closed,” dropped just months after Zayn brought Khai to see BLACKPINK live. “I got some good dad points for that,” he said before sharing that he’s always thinking of his daughter when making new music.

recentArticles.snippet: # Megan Thee Stallion taken to hospital during Moulin Rouge performance. Rapper Megan Thee Stallion had to be taken to hospital mid-way through her performance of Moulin Rouge! The musician, 31, is performing as Zidler – the show's eccentric master of ceremonies – marking her highly anticipated Broadway debut. Megan Thee Stallion, whose real name is Megan Pete, is scheduled to play Zidler until 17 May, the Moulin Rouge website says. Megan Thee Stallion is best-known for hits including Savage, WAP and Body. In 2021, she won three Grammy awards for Best Rap Song, Best New Artist and Best Rap Performance. Harold Zidler was first played by Danny Burstein in the original Broadway cast of Moulin Rouge, and won a coveted Tony award in 2020 for it. More recently, celebrity drag artist Bob the Drag Queen played Zidler in the musical for eight weeks earlier this year. The BBC has contacted Megan Thee Stallion's team for comment.

recentArticles.snippet: # As GLP-1 Adoption Surges, Jay Campbell’s Metabolic Awakening with GLP-1 Peptides Rewrites the Conversation on Metabolic Health. Five-time international bestselling author Jay Campbell steps into this inflection point with the release of his newest book *Metabolic Awakening with GLP-1 Peptides*, a strategically grounded examination of how GLP-1 based therapies can be implemented with precision rather than recklessness. In *Metabolic Awakening with GLP-1 Peptides*, Jay outlines a measured GLP-1 microdosing framework designed to protect endocrine balance, preserve muscle mass for optimal body composition, and minimize rebound of dysregulated appetite signaling. Jay explores the broader hormonal cascade outside of GLP-1, including GIP and glucagon signaling, and translates complex biochemical networks into actionable strategies intended for long-term metabolic resilience. Jay’s newest book positions itself not as a countertrend, but as a recalibration—inviting readers to pursue a state of metabolic optimization that compounds long after the headlines fade. Jay Campbell is a five-time international bestselling author and health optimization expert with more than 20 years of professional experience in hormone and metabolic health.

The Sweet 16 of the men's 2026 NCAA Tournament tips off later tonight in a series of games that feature the two highest-remaining seeds in the tournament. recentArticles.title: Foley Entertainment Group Names Jay Heidenreich Vice President of Sales and Giovanni Salvino-Prada Vice President of Marketing - Hotel News Resource
recentArticles.snippet: # Foley Entertainment Group Names Jay Heidenreich Vice President of Sales and Giovanni Salvino-Prada Vice President of Marketing. **In Brief:** Foley Entertainment Group has announced new appointments, with Jay Heidenreich taking on the role of Vice President of Sales and Giovanni Salvino-Prada stepping into the Vice President of Marketing position. * Giovanni Salvino-Prada and Jay Heidenreich - Image Credit Foley Entertainment Group. Foley Entertainment Group has appointed Jay Heidenreich as Vice President of Sales and Giovanni Salvino-Prada as Vice President of Marketing. In these roles, Heidenreich and Salvino-Prada will oversee global sales and marketing strategy for the company’s portfolio, which includes wine country resort destinations, weddings and events at Foley Family Wine Vineyards, and The Foley Collection of private homes in or near wine country. Heidenreich and Salvino-Prada will oversee commercial strategy for Foley Entertainment Group’s properties, including MacArthur Place Hotel & Spa, Farmhouse Inn, 27 North Healdsburg, Black Walnut Inn & Vineyard, Grange Estate, Hotel Californian, and Wharekauhau Country Estate.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與華語歌手周杰倫無關，而是關於Foley Entertainment Group任命Jay Heidenreich為銷售副總裁和Giovanni Salvino-Prada為行銷副總裁。

recentArticles.title: Charlie Puth’s ‘Incredibly Honest’ Album ‘Whatever’s Clever!’ Has Arrived: Stream It Now - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Charlie Puth’s ‘Incredibly Honest’ Album ‘Whatever’s Clever!’ Has Arrived: Stream It Now. Puth's ambition was to "make a rich, warm, and big-sounding record.". Puth’s ambition was to “make a rich, warm, and big-sounding record.” To make the magic happen, BloodPop came on board as co-producer and to push Puth “to use sonics I hadn’t touched before, to sing about subjects I’d never sung about, and write songs that might’ve made me uncomfortable in the past.”. Career streams top 35 billion, he’s collected nine multi-platinum singles, four Grammy Award nominations, three Billboard Music Awards, a Critic’s Choice Award, a Golden Globe nomination, enjoyed a 12-week stint at No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 with his contribution to Wiz Khalifa’s 2015’s weepy *Fast And Furious* smash “See You Again,” and boasts three top 10 appearances on the Billboard 200 chart, including his most recent release, 2022’s *Charlie* (peaking at No. 10). Visit Billboard Pro for music business news.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導了美國歌手Charlie Puth發行新專輯《Whatever’s Clever!》的資訊，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Jeff Satur on 'Happy Ending,' 'Red Giant' and Going Global - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: “My dream from the start is just to play music, just to sing, just to perform,” Satur tells *Variety*. After roughly a decade in the Thai music industry without a breakthrough, he turned to acting, landing an OST for the BL drama “KinnPorsche the Series.” The song’s success gave his music career the traction it had long lacked. “I believe that a good team will give me a good career,” he says. That ethos is most visible in “Happy Ending,” a series on which Satur serves simultaneously as producer, scriptwriter, composer and lead actor. “The way I approach producing is like a song – you go into every little detail,” he says. So I have to do both.”. “Just release the song that nobody could find anywhere else, and try to be out of the comfort zone – a new version of Jeff Satur every year.”. “I want to go to as many countries as possible – to see them face to face in their own country.”.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於歌手Jeff Satur的音樂事業發展與全球化夢想，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

今日新聞摘要中，經仔細審閱所有提供的報導，並未發現任何與華語流行天王周杰倫相關的最新動態或新聞事件。所有提及『Jay-Z』的報導均為不同藝人的資訊，因此今日無周杰倫的焦點事件可供整理與發布。
周杰倫近日話題豐富，睽違四年將推新專輯，預告收錄求婚影片，並鬆口巡演最終站可能回台灣。他揭露當年向昆凌求婚的「假古堡」內幕，新歌MV斥資上億引發熱議。此外，他曾設計連川普都擁有的手錶，早期寫歌「罵方文山」也成經典。
周杰倫今日焦點圍繞新專輯《太陽之子》發行。主打歌MV斥資上億由《阿凡達》團隊打造，專輯中更收錄為小女兒Jacinda創作的《女兒殿下》，並預告將曝光他向昆凌求婚的浪漫影片。他還透露了求婚時的核彈級內幕，以及曾兩度恐慌症發作的經歷。此外，周董也鬆口未來巡演最終站可能回到台灣。
key_events: 透露求婚內幕與恐慌症

recentReports.daily_summary: 周杰倫睽違四年推出新專輯《太陽之子》，首波主打MV斥資上億元，由《阿凡達》團隊打造，並藏有30幅名畫彩蛋。專輯中為小女兒創作〈女兒殿下〉，更預告將公開與昆凌的求婚影片。他還分享曾兩度恐慌症發作，並透露巡演最終站可能回台灣。
